description: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).

goal_metrics.goal: Analyze the consistency of individual player performances, focusing on how batters and bowlers vary in their runs, balls faced, wickets taken, and other statistics across different matches.
Study the impact of different venues on match outcomes, analyzing the win rates for home and away teams and their relationship with individual player performances.
Analyze which individual player performances contribute most to match victories, focusing on the best players' batting and bowling statistics and their impact on the match outcome.
